reasoning: Candy pink petals and dark saturated green stem form a warm complementary pair that maps cleanly to the Echoes palette pink and green swatches. Overall palette compatibility is good and the icon would read warmly in-game, but a saturation bump on petals and a warm-tinted outline pass would push this to a confident pass.
